summary: Iteration 18 - Text Animation Features for Music Video Factory. All 23 backend tests passed. Code review verified all implementations. Features tested: (1) Backend textAnimation field in AssembleVideoRequest with default 'fade', (2) 6 animation options: none, fade, slide_up, slide_down, pop, bounce, (3) FFmpeg drawtext filter uses alpha expressions for fade/pop/bounce and y expressions for slide/pop/bounce, (4) Escaped commas (\,) in FFmpeg expressions, (5) Frontend Animation row with 6 buttons (data-testid='text-anim-{value}'), (6) Default animation is 'fade', (7) Assembly payload includes textAnimation field. Regression tests passed: /api/effects/list returns 20 effects, still-to-clip endpoint works.
passed_tests: Backend: Login works with test@example.com / test123456
Backend: API root endpoint returns 200
Backend: GET /api/effects/list returns 20 effects (regression)
Backend: /api/effects/list has 3 transitions (crossfade, cut, fade_black)
Backend: /api/effects/list has 6 presets
Backend: POST /api/projects/{id}/media/still-to-clip endpoint exists (regression)
Backend: AssembleVideoRequest has textAnimation: Optional[str] = 'fade'
Backend: All 6 animation types (none, fade, slide_up, slide_down, pop, bounce) are handled
Backend: Uses alpha expressions for fade animation
Backend: Uses y expressions for slide animations
Backend: Pop animation has quick appear (pd = 0.3)
Backend: Bounce animation has deceleration effect (bd = 0.5)
Backend: FFmpeg expressions use escaped commas (\\,)
Frontend: Animation row exists in text style controls
Frontend: All 6 animation buttons have correct data-testid pattern (text-anim-{value})
Frontend: Animation buttons have correct labels (None, Fade, Slide Up, Slide Down, Pop, Bounce)
Frontend: Default animation is 'fade'
Frontend: textAnimation included in assembly payload
Frontend: updateSettings('textAnimation', ...) called on button click
Backend: /api/video/assemble accepts textAnimation parameter
Code: Animation types match between frontend and backend
Code: MIN_HOOK_DURATION = 2.5 constant exists
Code: ANIM_DUR = 0.6 constant exists for animation timing
critical_code_review_comments: All requested text animation features are correctly implemented
Backend: textAnimation field added to AssembleVideoRequest with 6 options: none, fade, slide_up, slide_down, pop, bounce
Backend: FFmpeg drawtext filter generation uses alpha expressions for fade-in/fade-out effects
Backend: FFmpeg drawtext filter uses y expressions for vertical slide animations
Backend: Pop animation uses quick 0.3s duration with slight upward bounce
Backend: Bounce animation uses 0.5s duration with quadratic deceleration (drops from above)
Backend: All FFmpeg expressions properly escape commas with \\, for filter compatibility
Frontend: Animation row added after Style row in text-style-controls section
Frontend: 6 buttons with data-testid='text-anim-{value}' for automated testing
Frontend: Default animation is 'fade' (selected by default in UI)
Frontend: textAnimation sent in assembly payload to backend
AI Mode (Step5AnimateClips) is untouched - only Library mode uses FFmpeg text animations
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user and projects
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 18 are verified: (1) textAnimation field in AssembleVideoRequest with 6 options (none, fade, slide_up, slide_down, pop, bounce), (2) FFmpeg drawtext uses alpha expressions for fade effects and y expressions for slide/bounce effects, (3) Animation buttons in Step6AssembleVideo with data-testid='text-anim-{value}', (4) Default animation is 'fade', (5) ANIM_DUR = 0.6 for standard animations, pd = 0.3 for pop, bd = 0.5 for bounce. Test project 69d1609e3dbd882c6ec76c2a exists but needs audio for full wizard testing.

verified_features.feature_1_textanimation_field: VERIFIED - AssembleVideoRequest has textAnimation: Optional[str] = 'fade' with 6 options
verified_features.feature_2_animation_none: VERIFIED - 'none' animation shows text instantly with alpha=1, no y movement
verified_features.feature_3_animation_fade: VERIFIED - 'fade' uses alpha expression for smooth fade in/out over ANIM_DUR (0.6s)
verified_features.feature_4_animation_slide_up: VERIFIED - 'slide_up' combines alpha fade with y offset that decreases (text rises from below)
verified_features.feature_5_animation_slide_down: VERIFIED - 'slide_down' combines alpha fade with y offset that increases (text drops from above)
verified_features.feature_6_animation_pop: VERIFIED - 'pop' uses quick 0.3s duration with slight upward bounce effect
verified_features.feature_7_animation_bounce: VERIFIED - 'bounce' uses 0.5s duration with quadratic deceleration (drops with bounce)
verified_features.feature_9_default_fade: VERIFIED - Default animation is 'fade' in both frontend and backend
verified_features.feature_10_escaped_commas: VERIFIED - FFmpeg expressions use \\, for comma escaping inside filter strings
verified_features.regression_effects_list: VERIFIED - GET /api/effects/list returns 20 effects, 3 transitions, 6 presets
